title: DLSA Jhabua – Vehicle Driver – 1 Posts
shortInfo: District Legal Services Authority Jhabua (DLSA Jhabua) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Vehicle Driver. Candidates with 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 05-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DLSA Jhabua official website jhabua.dcourts.gov.in.
